name: local-llm-setup
one_liner: Zero to a running local LLM on your Mac, Linux, or Windows machine — in one command.
notes: Public OSS CLI (MIT), at v1.1.0 — macOS + Linux + Windows, GPU-aware sizing. Dogfooded 2026-06-14 on an M5 Pro / 24 GB: qwen2.5-coder:14b running at ~25.7 tok/s, OpenAI-compatible API verified. Registered here per the Admission Policy only after a real working local LLM was in use, not just because the repo shipped.
